title: docs(ci): strengthen CI-RED-019/003 closures with current-main re-witness + fix handoff typos
intent: Docs-only follow-up to #187 (merged bed827ab). #187 closed CI-RED-003 and CI-RED-019 in SPRINTS.md pinned to run witnesses @ e1310768. This PR (1) adds the current-main re-witness (both gates green on the later main tip 8c5244d2 — technical_debt run 28700637324, routing_truth run 28700637339, 2026-07-04) to the 003/019 detail sections and the handoff witness tables, so the closures demonstrably hold past the pinned SHA; and (2) fixes 'CL-RED' -> 'CI-RED' typos in the reconciliation handoff. No product code, no workflow files, no status changes (016/021 stay OPEN, 020 CLOSED, C2/PR-182/PR-185 untouched); #187's own merged manifest is left as its historical compliance record.

diff_articulation.what_changed: (1) SPRINTS.md CI-RED-003 + CI-RED-019 detail sections: append a current-main re-witness clause to each closure — both enforced gates are still green on the later main tip 8c5244d2 (technical_debt run 28700637324, routing_truth run 28700637339, both push, 2026-07-04), so each closure holds past the pinned e1310768. Closure scope/wording otherwise unchanged (003 = enforced debt-gates gate, not raw complexity landscape; 019 = mask-peel, any future routing-truth red is a NEW verdict). (2) docs/handoffs/CI_RED_019_003_LEDGER_RECONCILIATION_HANDOFF.md: correct two 'CL-RED' typos to 'CI-RED', and prepend the 8c5244d2 witness row to the routing_truth and technical_debt witness tables. (3) this per-PR CBSP21 manifest.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: The pre-existing ledger rows pin their witnesses to e1310768, which main has since moved past (8c5244d2, then bed827ab). Adding the verified current-main re-witness closes the stale-witness gap (a closure could otherwise read as true only at a superseded SHA), and the typo fix keeps the audit-of-record handoff accurate/searchable. Bookkeeping only; no code, workflow, or status change.

commands_run: re-witness: gh run list --workflow technical_debt.yml --branch main -> 28700637324 success @ 8c5244d2; --workflow routing_truth.yml -> 28700637339 success @ 8c5244d2
cited runs still green: 28693530077 (debt) / 28693530110 (routing) both success @ e1310768
local: py -3.11 -m app.ci.check_complexity --baseline app/ci/complexity_baseline.json -> OK: No functions exceed complexity 15
local: python scripts/ci/check_cbsp21_patch_input.py --base origin/main --head HEAD -> PASS
grep CL-RED across changed docs -> 0 remaining; markdown tables keep column counts

files.intent: Append current-main (8c5244d2) re-witness to the CI-RED-003 and CI-RED-019 closure detail sections; no status/scope change.
Fix CL-RED->CI-RED typos; add 8c5244d2 witness rows to the routing_truth/technical_debt tables.
Per-PR CBSP21 manifest for this docs-only follow-up.
